project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: Reading List Data (Page Titles, Descriptions, Thumbnails)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: Reading list sync uses ReadingListClient to synchronize locally stored reading lists with MediaWiki server via custom API. Supports two-way sync with conflict resolution.

flow_steps.details: Sync triggered on login, manual refresh, or periodic WorkManager schedule. Can force full resync.
CSRF token acquired for authenticated API requests.
Synchronizes reading lists between local Room database and server. Sends page titles, descriptions, thumbnails, and list metadata.

flow_steps.code: class AppDatabase : RoomDatabase() { abstract fun readingListDao(): ReadingListDao }
flow_steps.details: Reading lists persisted locally via Room database. Stores list names, page IDs, descriptions, thumbnails, and sync state.

flow_steps.code: override suspend fun doWork(): Result { ... val client = ReadingListClient(wiki) ... }
flow_steps.details: Sync loop processes: local changes pushed to server, remote changes pulled to local, deletions propagated. Conflict resolution via last-write-wins with timestamp comparison.
After reading list sync, triggers saved pages sync to update offline cache.
